abilities.description: Drenches an area in sticky oil, amplifying damage from Batrider's attacks and abilities and slowing the movement speed and turn rate of enemies in the area. Additional casts of Sticky Napalm continue to increase damage, up to 10 stacks.
abilities.name: Sticky Napalm
abilities.story: It's not uncommon to hear the Rider cackle while he increases the flammability of his opponents.

abilities.description: Hurls an explosive cocktail that explodes when it reaches the target location, knocking back, and dealing damage over time to enemies in the area.
abilities.name: Flamebreak
abilities.story: A molotov cocktail is the weapon of choice for Batrider.

abilities.description: Batrider takes to the skies, laying down a trail of flames from the air. The fire damages any enemies it touches, and destroys trees below Batrider.
abilities.name: Firefly
abilities.story: When an enemy escapes into the Yama Raskav Jungle, most would cut through the brush to find the fugitive. Batrider just chooses to destroy the jungle along with his foes.

abilities.description: Lassoes an enemy and drags them in Batrider's wake. Dragged units cannot move, attack, or use abilities. Teleporting or blinking will break the lasso.
abilities.name: Flaming Lasso
abilities.story: Few dare to ask to ride on the bat, as Batrider gives them free of charge.

description: Can lasso an enemy away from his team. While most would find being kidnapped by a morde-bat to be a terrifying ordeal, one particular young man found the incident exhilarating. Seeking to relive the thrill of flight, he entered the Yama Raskav Jungle, and came out soaring high above the canopy as the Batrider. Atop his leathery mount, he drenches targets below in Sticky Napalm, increasing their flammability before setting the land ablaze by flying up in the sky glowing like a Firefly. To ignite enemies from afar, he hurls an explosive cocktail with an explosion strong enough to knock foes away. Want a ride? That can be arranged. As he spots his targets from above, and throws out his Flaming Lasso to string them along for a fiery experience they will not soon forget.  Initiator Disabler Escape  Arachnophobic, Cape, Fiery, Flying, Red, Steed, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Batrider is occasionally referred to as "Batman" in game, mostly due to the recent popularity of Christopher Nolan's the Dark Knight trilogy starring Christian Bale and Gary Oldman.
